od_description: Soura ↔ Nowshera via Lal Bazar (NE old-city Srinagar), with an eastern arm toward Nishat/Harwan that partly follows the SSCL Parimpora–Harwan e-bus alignment.
matched_permit: Parimpora to Harwan via Brein Nishat
stops_verdict: Strong stops along the Soura–Nowshera–Lal Bazar core (2500/29 at Soura end etc.). Genuine local boarding points.
narrative: A busy NE-Srinagar local corridor: Soura ↔ Nowshera via Lal Bazar. All candidate permits are Hazratbal/Parimpora routes with only 0.37-0.41 overlap — geographically off. The map shows the eastern arm coincides with the SSCL-01 Parimpora↔Harwan e-bus (via Brein/Nishat), so it PARTIALLY rides that alignment, but the Soura–Nowshera–Lal Bazar core is not a clean permitted O→D. Notable: 150 runs / 12 drivers of real service on a corridor the formal permit network covers poorly.
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Nowshera (A), Soura (B), Lal Bazar (mid)
map: observed core Soura–Nowshera; eastern arm overlaps SSCL-01 (Parimpora–Harwan via Nishat)
all permit overlaps low (0.37-0.41) — no clean match
data_quality_flags: partial permit match only; core O–D under-served by formal permits — candidate local route for RTO review
implied_headway 293 min is a partial-adoption artifact
CORRECTED: not informal/under-permitted; observed geometry diverges from rationalised route (see correction field)
analyst_note: Finding: busy NE-Srinagar local circulation (Soura–Nowshera–Lal Bazar) with weak formal-permit coverage, partly on the SSCL Parimpora–Harwan alignment.
correction_raw_permit_check: RAW-PERMIT CHECK (2026-07-02): the places on this corridor ARE in the raw permit system (e.g. Lalbazar 26 / Soura 83 / Gulabagh 2 / Budgam 42 / Pampore 40 permit endpoints; smaller mahallas are traversed, named for major endpoints). Retracting any 'under-permitted/informal' reading — the ≤0.40 overlap is with the engine's RATIONALISED geometry, so this is a DIVERGENCE between the rationalised route geometry and observed reality (engine to reconcile), NOT an informal route.
